SUPPLY-CHAIN CONCENTRATION RISK

2 critical-tier vendors — DataVault Cloud & FinWire Settlement — both carry overdue assessments and contract gaps, and both serve your top two clients (Meridian Bank, GovNet). This is a single point of supply-chain failure feeding directly into client-facing posture. Prioritise reassessment.
